what: Set the active project in the navigation store
why: Updates global navigation context so ContextualSidebar renders with project-specific info (linked vaults list) and navigation (Sessions)

success_handling.criteria: Selected project is stored as the active project in the navigation store
success_handling.transition: active project reflected in sidebar context

decisions.reason: selectProject clears activeVault; no navigation occurs
decisions.rationale: Only one context type active at a time. Sidebar appears reactively — no further step or dialog needed.

decisions.reason: Project sidebar shows linked vault names (informational) + Sessions nav, not a Vaults link
decisions.rationale: Top-nav /vaults is global vault management and must never be filtered by project. Project-linked vaults are displayed as text in the sidebar (names only, derived from connected_vaults IDs resolved against the vault store). Sessions is the only navigable link in the project sidebar. Knowledge is vault-scoped and shown in the vault sidebar instead.
